tools.name: Color Block
tools.description: Colour blocks — text, headshot, logo — auto-arranged into a grid.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 22V7a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H2" /><rect x="14" y="2" width="8" height="8" rx="1" /></svg>

tools.name: Dynamic Layout
tools.description: A do-anything layout that recomposes around whatever you add, at any size.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" /><path d="M3 9h18" /><path d="M9 21V9" /></svg>

tools.name: Quote Card
tools.description: On-brand quote cards for social posts and slides.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 3a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v6a2 2 0 0 0 2 2 1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1 6 6 0 0 0 6-6V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z" /><path d="M5 3a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v6a2 2 0 0 0 2 2 1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1 6 6 0 0 0 6-6V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z" /></svg>

tools.name: Meeting Planner
tools.description: Plan a global meeting and see the time for every teammate's timezone.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" /><path d="M12 2a14.5 14.5 0 0 0 0 20 14.5 14.5 0 0 0 0-20" /><path d="M2 12h20" /></svg>

tools.name: Code Canvas
tools.description: Turn code snippets into clean, syntax-highlighted, shareable images.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m7 11 2-2-2-2" /><path d="M11 13h4" /><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" ry="2" /></svg>

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: On-brand QR codes for any URL, with full color and style control.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="5" height="5" x="3" y="3" rx="1" /><rect width="5" height="5" x="16" y="3" rx="1" /><rect width="5" height="5" x="3" y="16" rx="1" /><path d="M21 16h-3a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3" /><path d="M21 21v.01" /><path d="M12 7v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7" /><path d="M3 12h.01" /><path d="M12 3h.01" /><path d="M12 16v.01" /><path d="M16 12h1" /><path d="M21 12v.01" /><path d="M12 21v-1" /></svg>

tools.name: Day Brief
tools.description: Quote of the day with live weather, time and a map for any city.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2v2" /><path d="m4.93 4.93 1.41 1.41" /><path d="M20 12h2" /><path d="m19.07 4.93-1.41 1.41" /><path d="M15.947 12.65a4 4 0 0 0-5.925-4.128" /><path d="M13 22H7a5 5 0 1 1 4.9-6H13a3 3 0 0 1 0 6Z" /></svg>

tools.name: Logo
tools.description: Place the SUSE logo — it auto-picks the right variant and exports vector.

tools.name: Email Signature
tools.description: An on-brand SUSE email signature, ready to paste into any client.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m22 7-8.991 5.727a2 2 0 0 1-2.009 0L2 7" /><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2" /></svg>

tools.name: Chart Creator
tools.description: On-brand charts from your data — bar, donut, pie or stacked.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 21v-6" /><path d="M12 21V9" /><path d="M19 21V3" /></svg>

tools.name: Bag Video
tools.description: An animated, on-brand video for bag visuals.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" /><path d="M7 3v18" /><path d="M3 7.5h4" /><path d="M3 12h18" /><path d="M3 16.5h4" /><path d="M17 3v18" /><path d="M17 7.5h4" /><path d="M17 16.5h4" /></svg>

tools.name: Duotone Filter
tools.description: A two-color duotone for any photo — shadows one color, highlights another.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" /><path d="M12 18a6 6 0 0 0 0-12v12z" /></svg>

tools.name: Color Palette
tools.description: Browse SUSE brand colors — click a swatch to copy it.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22a1 1 0 0 1 0-20 10 9 0 0 1 10 9 5 5 0 0 1-5 5h-2.25a1.75 1.75 0 0 0-1.4 2.8l.3.4a1.75 1.75 0 0 1-1.4 2.8z" /><circle cx="13.5" cy="6.5" r=".5" fill="currentColor" /><circle cx="17.5" cy="10.5" r=".5" fill="currentColor" /><circle cx="6.5" cy="12.5" r=".5" fill="currentColor" /><circle cx="8.5" cy="7.5" r=".5" fill="currentColor" /></svg>

tools.name: Countdown Timer
tools.description: A focused countdown with a live progress ring. Click to pause.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="10" x2="14" y1="2" y2="2" /><line x1="12" x2="15" y1="14" y2="11" /><circle cx="12" cy="14" r="8" /></svg>

tools.name: URL Screenshot
tools.description: Any web page, at any scroll-depth, with custom CSS
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13.997 4a2 2 0 0 1 1.76 1.05l.486.9A2 2 0 0 0 18.003 7H20a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h1.997a2 2 0 0 0 1.759-1.048l.489-.904A2 2 0 0 1 10.004 4z" /><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="3" /></svg>

tools.name: Street Map
tools.description: Clean vector street-block maps of any city. Works offline.

tools.name: Strip Hidden Data
tools.description: Reveal and remove hidden metadata from images and PDFs — on your device.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 21H8a2 2 0 0 1-1.42-.587l-3.994-3.999a2 2 0 0 1 0-2.828l10-10a2 2 0 0 1 2.829 0l5.999 6a2 2 0 0 1 0 2.828L12.834 21" /><path d="m5.082 11.09 8.828 8.828" /></svg>

tools.name: Text Helper
tools.description: Format, decode, hash and de-identify text — JSON, JWT and more.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 3H7a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v5a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 2 2 0 0 1 2 2v5c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h1" /><path d="M16 21h1a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5c0-1.1.9-2 2-2a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-1" /></svg>

tools.name: Event Name Badge
tools.description: Conference name badges with a colour-coded role and optional QR.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13.5 8h-3" /><path d="m15 2-1 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3" /><path d="M16.899 22A5 5 0 0 0 7.1 22" /><path d="m9 2 3 6" /><circle cx="12" cy="15" r="3" /></svg>

tools.name: Wayfinding Signage
tools.description: Directional event signs — destinations, each with an arrow. Print-ready.

tools.name: Brand Lockup
tools.description: Official SUSE logo lockups — chameleon, wordmark and a name.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 13V8.5C14 7 15 7 15 5a3 3 0 0 0-6 0c0 2 1 2 1 3.5V13" /><path d="M20 15.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 0-2.5-2.5h-11A2.5 2.5 0 0 0 4 15.5V17a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h14a1 1 0 0 0 1-1z" /><path d="M5 22h14" /></svg>

tools.name: Halftone Filter
tools.description: Vector halftone from any photo — dots sized by brightness.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="1" /><circle cx="19" cy="5" r="1" /><circle cx="5" cy="5" r="1" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1" /><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1" /><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1" /><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="1" /><circle cx="19" cy="19" r="1" /><circle cx="5" cy="19" r="1" /></svg>

tools.name: Animated Ad
tools.description: Build animated ads from layered scenes for any standard size.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m12.296 3.464 3.02 3.956" /><path d="M20.2 6 3 11l-.9-2.4c-.3-1.1.3-2.2 1.3-2.5l13.5-4c1.1-.3 2.2.3 2.5 1.3z" /><path d="M3 11h18v8a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z" /><path d="m6.18 5.276 3.1 3.899" /></svg>

tools.name: Calendar ICS
tools.description: Turn event details into a calendar (.ics) file for any calendar app.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 2v4" /><path d="M16 2v4" /><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="4" rx="2" /><path d="M3 10h18" /></svg>

tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Shrink a PDF by recompressing its images — on your device.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m15 15 6 6m-6-6v4.8m0-4.8h4.8" /><path d="M9 19.8V15m0 0H4.2M9 15l-6 6" /><path d="M15 4.2V9m0 0h4.8M15 9l6-6" /><path d="M9 4.2V9m0 0H4.2M9 9 3 3" /></svg>

tools.name: Scanline Filter
tools.description: Retro scanline effect from any photo in brand tones.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 7V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2" /><path d="M17 3h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2" /><path d="M21 17v2a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-2" /><path d="M7 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-2" /><path d="M7 12h10" /></svg>
